text: IRGC POWER CONSOLIDATION: Euronews/Time/CNN all reporting IRGC commander Ahmad Vahidi now making military/political decisions alongside Mojtaba Khamenei. Pezeshkian blocked from appointments. AI-generated videos of absent Supreme Leader. US officials confirm 'absolute fracture' between negotiators and military. Iran has become 'a powerful militia with a state.'
verificationNote: Confirmed by Euronews, Time, CNN, Axios. IRGC power structure analysis from ISW and US intelligence.

text: ESPIONAGE: Two Israeli Air Force technicians from Tel Nof Airbase charged with spying for Iran during Operation Roaring Lion. Passed F-15 engine diagrams and pilot photographs. 8 more soldiers suspected of knowing without reporting. Part of '400% increase in Iranian recruitment attempts since Oct 2023.' 50+ espionage indictments total.
verificationNote: Confirmed by Jerusalem Post liveblog April 22.

text: JOURNALIST KILLED: Al Akhbar reporter Amal Khalil (43) confirmed dead in Israeli airstrike on al-Tiri village, southern Lebanon. Colleague Zeinab Faraj critically injured. CPJ called for rescue — Israeli drone dropped sound grenade on rescue teams, blocking access ~4 hours. 9th journalist killed in Lebanon this year. Lebanese PM Salam: 'war crime.'
verificationNote: Confirmed by Al Jazeera, WaPo, CPJ, Xinhua, Naharnet. Al Akhbar confirmed employment.

text: PENTAGON: FY2027 budget request at $1.5 TRILLION — 42% increase, biggest since WWII. $74B for drones (3x), $30B for munitions, 785 Tomahawk missiles (up from 55 = 14x increase). Separately, Pentagon removed 15 wounded from casualty rolls without explanation — dropped from 428 to 413. Navy Secretary Phelan fired during active blockade; Hung Cao installed.
verificationNote: Budget from The Hill, Military.com. Casualty removal from The Intercept. Navy Sec from CNN.

text: DAY 55 ROUNDUP: Brent $103.38 (+29.5%), WTI $93.09 (+23.3%) — 4th straight gain. Gas $4.04. Vitol CEO: 600-700M bbl lost. IRGC power grab exposed. Journalist Amal Khalil killed in Lebanon. Hezbollah fires first time since Apr 16. Senate war powers vote #5 fails 46-51. Lebanon to request 1-month ceasefire extension at Thursday DC talks. New US sanctions: 22 targets. Iran Air resumes domestic flights. Trump: 'no time frame.'
verificationNote: Compiled from CNBC, CNN, Al Jazeera, Times of Israel, CBS News, Democracy Now, Xinhua. All verified.

text: HORMUZ VIDEO: Iran releases footage of IRGC Navy boarding MSC Francesca (11,312 TEU, Panama-flagged) and Epaminondas. Both ships stationary off Sirik. Panama FM condemns as 'illegal' and 'grave attack against maritime security.' CENTCOM count rises to 31 vessels turned back. White House: seizures 'not ceasefire violation' since 'international vessels.'
verificationNote: Confirmed by Al Jazeera video, CNN, France 24, Lloyd's List, CBS News.

text: SATELLITE INTEL: Sentinel-2 imagery (April 22) captures 33 IRGC 'mosquito fleet' fast-attack boats near Kargan coast north of Hormuz. Armed with short-range anti-ship missiles. Tasnim (IRGC-linked) published mapping of 7 undersea internet cables through Hormuz — Gulf states depend 90%+ on these cables for internet/banking. Implicit threat to cut.
verificationNote: The Week (satellite imagery from Mehdi H.), Iran International, Stimson Center analysis, BusinessToday India.

text: MARKETS RECORD: S&P 500 closes above 7,000 FIRST TIME (7,137.90, +1.05%). Nasdaq 24,657.57 — 13-session win streak, longest since 1992. Markets have FULLY ERASED all Iran war losses. 75% earnings beat rate. Analysts warn: Hormuz still closed, oil at $103.38, rally may be misplaced optimism. IMF cut global growth to 3.1%.
verificationNote: CNN, Yahoo Finance, CNBC, Bloomberg confirmed. IMF World Economic Outlook April 2026.

text: LEBANON: Israel demolishing homes across 10km buffer zone in southern Lebanon. AP journalists: Beit Lif 'almost entirely flattened.' UNIFIL warns displaced have nowhere to return. Lebanon-Israel Round 2 talks begin at State Dept — Lebanon demands: full withdrawal, prisoner release, army deployment. PM Salam: 'no talks without Israeli withdrawal.'
verificationNote: WaPo (AP reporters on scene), Common Dreams, SCMP, PBS News, The National confirmed.

text: IRAN REVENUE: Deputy parliament speaker Hajibabaei: first Hormuz toll revenue deposited into Central Bank. Amount unknown. Meanwhile US seizes M/T Majestic X carrying sanctioned Iranian oil in Indian Ocean — enforcement expanding beyond Hormuz. Iran Air resumed Tehran-Mashhad domestic flights after 50-day suspension. 10+ airports reopening from April 25.
verificationNote: Free Malaysia Today, Free Press Journal (toll). NPR (Majestic X). Xinhua, RusTourismNews (Iran Air).

text: DAY 55 AM ROUNDUP: IRGC releases ship seizure video — Panama condemns. 33 fast-attack boats near Kargan (satellite). First Hormuz toll revenue banked. S&P above 7K. Brent $103.38. Gas $4.04. Beit Lif 'flattened.' Lebanon-Israel talks begin. Pezeshkian: US 'hypocritical rhetoric.' Trump claims saved 8 women from execution — Iran denies. CENTCOM: 31 ships turned back. US seizes Majestic X.
verificationNote: Compiled from Al Jazeera, CNN, The Week, WaPo, Business Standard, Fox News/SCMP, Free Malaysia Today, NPR. All verified.

text: HORMUZ ESCALATION: Trump ordered US Navy to 'shoot and kill' any Iranian boat laying mines in Strait of Hormuz — 'We have total control... Sealed up Tight, until Iran is able to make a DEAL!!!' Pentagon told Congress clearing strait of mines could take up to 6 months if extensively laid. IRGC seized MSC Francesca escorted into Iranian waters by IRGC speedboats.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, CNN, Washington Post, Maritime Optima. All verified.

text: CARRIER STRIKE: USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) entered CENTCOM AOR April 23 — 3rd US aircraft carrier in theater. Joins USS Gerald R. Ford (Red Sea) and USS Abraham Lincoln (Arabian Sea). Bush transited via Cape of Good Hope — 6,000-mile detour around Africa to avoid Houthi threats at Bab el-Mandeb. Unprecedented Navy posture.
verificationNote: Times of Israel liveblog, Stars and Stripes. Confirmed.

text: MUNITIONS: CSIS analysis finds US has expended roughly HALF of its Patriot interceptor inventory during the Iran war. Rebuilding stockpiles will take YEARS. Pentagon supplemental request: $50B for Tomahawks, Patriots, THAAD replenishment. 850+ Tomahawks fired in 4 weeks (~$3.6M each = $3.06B+).
verificationNote: Fox News reporting on CSIS analysis. Washington Post on Tomahawk burn rate. TRT World on Pentagon $50B supplemental.

text: IRAN SHIPPING: 31 vessels now turned around by US CENTCOM blockade (up from 29 earlier April 22). Operation involves 10,000+ troops, 17 warships, 100+ aircraft. US seized 4th Iranian-linked tanker M/T Majestic X in Indian Ocean between Sri Lanka and Indonesia — blockade enforcement now extending beyond Hormuz.
verificationNote: CENTCOM press release, Business Standard, Seatrade Maritime, Washington Post. All verified.

text: TEHRAN AIR DEFENSE: Iran's Mehr News reported air defense batteries engaged 'hostile targets' over parts of Tehran April 23 — reason unclear. Israeli security official denied Israel was conducting strikes. First reported air defense activity since ceasefire took effect. Could indicate drone incursion, false alarm, or internal dissent.
verificationNote: Al Arabiya (citing Mehr News), Haaretz liveblog. Israeli denial reported.

text: DAY 55 MIDDAY ROUNDUP: Trump orders 'shoot and kill' mine-layers. USS George H.W. Bush = 3rd US carrier. Navy Sec Phelan ousted by Hegseth. Tehran air defenses engage 'hostile targets.' Pope Leo XIV aboard plane calls for peace. 2nd French UNIFIL peacekeeper dies. Senate defeats Baldwin war powers 46-51. Gaza strike kills 5 (3 children). Brent $103.38 (+29.5%), WTI $94.46 (+25.1%). Gas $4.03.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, CNN, NPR, Times of Israel, The Hill, Al Arabiya, America Magazine, Euronews. All verified.
